query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gestantes) AS total_gestantes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM partosRealizados) AS total_partos,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT gestanteId) FROM partosRealizados) AS gestantes_com_parto;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM partosRealizados) AS total_partos,
